Petition Of Trustee John Andrew Blaiotta For Court Instructions Regarding Sale Of Trust Property In
Off Calendar Feb-13-2013 Continued To Mar-27-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Grabstein for and with John Blaiotta. Stephen Sherman and Robert Sheppard for and with Evelyn Schneider.

Counsel reported that the Parties reached a settlement and that they will be filing a Petition for Approval of the Settlement. The Petition of Trustee for Court Instructions Regarding Sale of Trust Property was continued to March 27, 2013 and specially set at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
